title: Move boards between folders via API
excerpt: Is there a good way to move a board between folders? The only way I’m seeing that to be possible is by duplicating a board into a folder then deleting the old one

posts.author: Grant (Grant)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a good way to move a board between folders? The only way I’m seeing that to be possible is by duplicating a board into a folder then deleting the old one

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Grant — moving boards between folders is not supported at the moment. When we implemented the folders API we wanted to start with actions for creating folder structures.

That said, I’ll pass this feedback over to our developers!

EDIT: I moved this into a new feature request topic so folks can vote for it!
